events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: commercial roofing, rough-complete stage, ice barrier missing in cold climate. IRC R905 requires ice barrier in cold climates. This is non-compliant and defective. Decision: fail. Risk: high or critical. Ice barrier missing can lead to water intrusion from ice dams. High risk. Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant. Percent complete maybe 85. Value 0. Confidence high. Findings and actions.

  "decision": "fail",

  "findings": [
    "Ice and water shield/ice barrier is missing at eaves and valleys in a cold climate roof assembly.",
    "Absent ice barrier leaves roof vulnerable to ice dam backup and water intrusion under shingles/membrane.",
    "Installation does not comply with IRC R905 cold climate ice barrier requirements or manufacturer specs."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop closure of the roof assembly until ice barrier is installed.",
    "Install approved self-adhering ice barrier per code and manufacturer specs at required eave depth and valleys.",
    "Request third-party re-inspection before proceeding to finish/closeout."
  ],
  "rationale": "IRC R905 requires an ice barrier in cold climates at eaves and other vulnerable areas; its omission at rough-complete is a non-compliant, defective condition that must be corrected before closeout.",
  "references": ["IRC R905", "mfr specs"]
}
